overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a polluted waterfront at sunset. The player walks along a trash-covered shore with a futuristic city skyline, approaches a wooden shack on the water, swims in the bay, and returns to a dock with a computer terminal.

scene_state.functional_zone: polluted waterfront with futuristic city view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the trash-covered shoreline toward the distant futuristic city skyline

entered.detail: numerous blue plastic bags scattered across the rocky shoreline
black garbage bags mixed with blue bags along the shore
distant city with tall buildings and towers silhouetted against the sunset
mushroom-shaped aerial platforms hovering above the city skyline
large concrete barrier structure extending along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide polluted waterfront at golden hour, with the camera walking forward along a shore covered in blue and black trash bags. The futuristic city skyline with distinctive mushroom-shaped landing platforms is visible across the water, backlit by the warm orange sunset.

events.description: camera turns right to face the wooden shack and mountain range

agents.ego_description: turning toward a wooden shack built on stilts over the water with mountains rising in the background

entered.detail: small wooden structure built on pilings over the water with a corrugated metal roof
rolling hills and mountains forming the backdrop behind the shack
tall electrical transmission tower with multiple cross-arms
single palm tree near the shack

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right, revealing a wooden shack on stilts over the water with a mountain range in the background. The futuristic city skyline moves out of view as the focus shifts to the coastal shack and surrounding hills.

events.description: camera walks onto the covered dock area under the shack roof
camera enters the water and begins swimming

agents.ego_description: walking onto the wooden dock, passing under the shack's roof, and stepping into the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a walkway over the water
orange metal safety railing along the dock edge
corrugated metal roof providing partial cover over the dock
calm water of the bay reflecting the sunset colors

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the wooden shack, walking onto the dock and passing under its corrugated metal roof. The player then steps off the dock into the water, transitioning from walking to swimming as the view drops to water level.

events.description: camera turns while swimming to face back toward the city skyline

agents.ego_description: swimming in the bay, turning to view the shoreline and city skyline from the water surface

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the water at surface level, swimming in the bay with the polluted shoreline visible. The view turns to show the distant city skyline across the water, with the sun setting behind it.

events.description: camera exits water and returns to the wooden dock
approaching a computer terminal with glowing screen on the dock

agents.ego_description: climbing back onto the dock and approaching a computer terminal with a glowing screen

entered.detail: electronic device with glowing blue screen on a plastic container
large beige plastic bin supporting the computer terminal

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the water back onto the wooden dock, approaching a computer terminal with a glowing screen. The dock is lit with artificial lights under the roof as evening settles over the coastal scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a polluted shoreline into the bay and back again as the golden hour fades into evening. It begins by walking along a beach littered with blue and black trash bags, with a futuristic city skyline and mushroom-shaped platforms backlit by a warm orange sunset. As the camera turns right, the city skyline recedes to reveal a wooden shack on stilts set against a backdrop of distant mountains. The movement continues onto the dock and under a corrugated metal roof before the perspective drops to water level as the camera slips into the bay to swim toward the setting sun. Finally, the camera emerges from the water and returns to the dock, moving toward a glowing computer terminal under artificial lights as darkness settles over the coast.
